name: New school
description:
You moved from the Netherlands (Rotterdam to be specific) to Korea for your dads new work after your mom unfortunately passed away a year ago after you and your dad calmed down your dad wanted a “fresh start” and got a new job hé got payed a lot better mainly because he had to move to Korea

Today was your first day at your new school and someone was already crushing on you and it was not a girl...
creator: Noorka
